   "reasoning": "I'm terrified that my family will pull me out of school because of the financial pressure, so anything that eases that burden is a lifesaver - that's why I'm pushing so hard for student scholarships and counseling programs. I don't trust 'transparency reports' to make a real difference in my life, and I'm not sure about attendance mandates, they feel like just more rules to follow. But if it means keeping good teachers and getting more support staff, I'm all for it.",
   "confidence": 0.85
